session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. PR #8960 submitted: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8960
**Summary of changes:**
1. **Deleted dead code** from `implement_shared.py`: Removed `IssuePlanSource` class, `prepare_plan_source_from_issue()` function, and their now-unused imports (`IssueBranchSetup`, `IssueValidationFailed`, `prepare_plan_for_worktree`, `PlanNotFound`)
2. **Cleaned stale docstring** in `create_plan_draft_pr.py`: Removed reference to deleted `erk exec create-plan-from-context` script
3. **Renamed module** `issue_workflow.py` → `plan_workflow.py` and updated all 4 source file imports + 1 test file import
4. **Renamed classes**: - `IssueBranchSetup` → `PlanBranchSetup` - `IssueValidationFailed` → `PlanValidationFailed` - `PrepareIssueResult` → `PreparePlanResult`
5. **Renamed test file** `test_issue_workflow.py` → `test_plan_workflow.py`
6. **Updated docstrings and error messages** to use "plan" terminology instead of "issue" where appropriate (preserving `issue_url`, `issue_title`, `objective_issue` field names as noted in the plan)
**Files modified (8):** - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_workflow.py` (renamed + class renames + docstrings) - `src/erk/cli/commands/implement_shared.py` (dead code removal) - `src/erk/cli/commands/branch/create_cmd.py` (imports + class names) - `src/erk/cli/commands/branch/checkout_cmd.py` (imports + class names) - `src/erk/cli/commands/wt/create_cmd.py` (imports + class names) - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/naming.py` (docstring reference) - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_store/create_plan_draft_pr.py` (stale docstring) - `tests/unit/shared/test_plan_workflow.py` (renamed + imports + class names + assertions)
